eas_text: A civil authority has issued A CHILD ABDUCTION EMERGENCY for the following counties or areas: Washington; at 3:33 AM on JUN 16, 2026 Effective until 4:33 AM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text: The Washington State Patrol on behalf of the Snohomish County Sheriff's Office has issued an Amber Alert for a 6 year old. Victim is a 6 year old Male named Eliab Carreno Carreno. Victim is 3 Feet 5 Inches tall, weighs 33 lbs, has Black Hair, Brown Eyes, wearing a blue and white shirt with dark blue pants. They were last seen on 06-15-2026 21:55 leaving the 3 2 0 0 block of 1 4 8 Street, Lynwood. They may be in Tukwila. He is in the company of Deivi Garcon Donado, a 32 year old Male, who is 5 feet 9 inches, weighing 180 lbs with black hair.  They may be traveling in a 2010 Silver Ford Fusion Washington State license plate number C V F 8 8 5 4.. If you have information, please call 9 1 1.
